__comment__: Give this file to an AI agent (like Antigravity or Claude) to automatically set up your environment.

project.name: CodeRouter
project.description: Unlock 200+ models in Claude Code without an Anthropic account.

setup_instructions.step_1: Update the 'user_preferences' section with your OpenRouter API key and preferred model.
setup_instructions.step_2: Provide this file to your AI Assistant.
setup_instructions.step_3: The Assistant will run 'npm install' and configure your .env file automatically.

agent_actions.configure_env: Create .env from .env.example, then replace placeholders with the values from 'user_preferences' in this JSON file.
